description_long: This is a weathered, elevated wooden cabin set on sturdy stilts, featuring a wraparound porch with railings and a sloped gable roof. The exterior is clad in aged, grayish wood planks, giving it a rustic and timeworn appearance. The roof includes two dormers and a stone chimney, adding architectural interest and suggesting a functional fireplace inside. Multiple windows with white frames are symmetrically distributed on the visible facades, and a covered porch area is supported by posts. The cabin is accessed via a side porch, which is partially enclosed by wooden railings. The structure appears designed for resilience against ground moisture or flooding, typical of cabins in rural or semi-urban settings.
description: A rustic, elevated wooden cabin with a gable roof, wraparound porch, dormers, and multiple white-framed windows, set on stilts.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the side, highlighting the main gable roof, a dormer, and the stilted foundation with a partial view of the porch and railings.
description_view_1: This view shows the front facade with two windows, the main entrance area, and the porch extending to the right, as well as the stone chimney.
description_view_2: The rear of the cabin is visible, featuring a covered porch area, a dormer, and the full extent of the wraparound porch with supporting posts.
description_view_3: A side angle reveals the porch wrapping around, the main entrance under a covered section, and the symmetrical window arrangement on the facade.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with two dormers, moderate overhangs, and a stone chimney; constructed from weathered wood shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small, rectangular windows with white frames are symmetrically distributed on all visible facades, including paired windows on the front and single windows on the sides and rear, with one dormer window on each roof slope.
attribute_door_placement: A single main door is located on the front facade, beneath the covered porch area, accessible from the wraparound porch.
